productDisplayName: Nike Men Main Draw White Shoe
description: Stylish and super comfortable, the Main Draw sneakers from nike will add an extra bounce to your steps. Lightweight and good-looking, you can wear them all day long to feel like you're walking on a bed of cotton. Look spectacular and wow in these comfy shoes.UpperSyntheitc leather upper for durability and styleStitch detailing for added structure and styleLace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized FitWell padded tongue and lushly-cushioned collar for a snug and secure fitPerforations on tongue for breathabilityBrand name and logo on tongue and behind collarnike Swoosh appliqued on sides for branding and styleMidsoleEVA midsole for long-term durability and protection of feet against impactCushioned footbed for all-day comfortTextile lining for increased comfortOutsoleLightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorptionHorizontal grooves on the forefoot and heel for better tractionSquare and circular lugs on the rest of the outsole for improved grip on all surfacesshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
